data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for promotion from waitlist when capacity opens.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for promotion from the waitlist when capacity opens. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the actual promotion process or the conditions under which it occurs. The existing evidence primarily focuses on customer bookings and waitlist entries without addressing the promotion aspect directly, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence confirming the promotion from waitlist when capacity opens.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the promotion from waitlist when capacity opens.
